name: downloads-manager-win
title: Downloads Manager
description: Search and organize your downloads - Windows Edition
author: bgraciotti

preferences.name: fileOrder
preferences.title: File Order
preferences.description: How to sort files in the list

preferences.name: latestDownloadOrder
preferences.title: Latest Download Order
preferences.description: How to determine the latest download

preferences.name: showHiddenFiles
preferences.title: Show Hidden Files
preferences.description: Show files starting with a dot
preferences.label: Show hidden files

preferences.name: downloadsLayout
preferences.title: Layout
preferences.description: Choose between list or grid view

commands.name: open-latest-download
commands.title: Open Latest Download
commands.description: Open the most recently downloaded file

commands.name: copy-latest-download
commands.title: Copy Latest Download
commands.description: Copy the most recently downloaded file to clipboard

commands.name: paste-latest-download
commands.title: Paste Latest Download
commands.description: Paste the most recently downloaded file

commands.name: show-latest-download
commands.title: Show Latest Download in Explorer
commands.description: Show the most recently downloaded file in Windows Explorer

commands.name: delete-latest-download
commands.title: Delete Latest Download
commands.description: Delete the most recently downloaded file

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
